description:
A modern self-hosted music player.


Added
- Added support for bit depth / sample rate fields in the item details page
Changed
- Adds keyboard accessibility to action buttons on Command Palette items (Thanks @Der-Penz) (#1024)
Fixed
- Fixed Discord RPC status when player is using Repeat One (Thanks @Lyall-A) (#1018)
- Various fixes to desktop notification on song change
- Fixed file path when setting a custom font from a file
- Fix pop-up notifications being displayed under other elements in certain situations
- Various Subsonic server fixes
What's Changed
- More typechecks on scrobble, use timeout on notification by @kgarner7 in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1004
- Bump @eslint/plugin-kit from 0.3.1 to 0.3.3 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1014
- Add qm-music to an OpenSubsonic compatible server list by @chenqimiao in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1023
- fix discord status clearing when song loops by @Lyall-A in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1018
- Support tab navigation on ActionIcons in command palette by @Der-Penz in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1024
- Bump form-data from 4.0.2 to 4.0.4 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1021
- Bump @eslint/plugin-kit from 0.3.3 to 0.3.4 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1030
New Contributors
- @chenqimiao made their first contribution in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1023
- @Der-Penz made their first contribution in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1024
Full Changelog: https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/compare/v0.18.0...v0.19.0
